name: test-1
description: 1. Open login.html → login as admin / Admin1234 → lands on admin.html 2. Go to Users tab in admin sidebar to manage registrations 3. Participants register via register.html → admin approves → they can log in → land on index.html 4. Each participant has isolated balances, XP, transactions, and challenges 5. Logout button appears in navbar on every protected page
